chatintegration-desc: Integrates wiki with various chat clients
chatbot-backend-message-processing-error: Error processing request. Please contact your wiki administrator.
chatbot-backend-message-ai-no-auth: No authentication provided for AI backend
chatintegration-msteams-droplet-desc: Insert a link to an MS Teams chat
chatintegration-slack-droplet-desc: Insert a link to a Slack chat
chatintegration-rocketchat-droplet-desc: Insert a link to a Rocket.Chat chat
chatintegration-zoom-droplet-desc: Insert a link to a Zoom chat
chatintegration-googlemeet-droplet-desc: Insert a link to a Google Meet chat
chatintegration-matrix-droplet-desc: Insert a link to a Matrix chat
chatintegration-inspector-msteams-descri: Insert a link to an MS Teams chat
chatintegration-inspector-slack-descript: Insert a link to a Slack chat
chatintegration-inspector-rocketchat-des: Insert a link to a Rocket.Chat chat
chatintegration-inspector-zoom-descripti: Insert a link to a Zoom chat
chatintegration-inspector-googlemeet-des: Insert a link to a Google Meet chat
chatintegration-inspector-matrix-descrip: Insert a link to a Matrix chat
chatintegration-tag-attr-url-help: Add the web address of the desired chat service
chatintegration-tag-attr-label-help: Text that appears as the caption for the chat link. Leave empty to display only an icon link
chatintegration-tag-attr-icon-size-help: Set the size of the icon
chatintegration-tag-attr-show-in-title-h: Show chat link in the title area of this page
chatintegration-sidebar-share-sharebymst: Share this page via Microsoft Teams
pref-chatintegration-sidebar-share-via-c: Adds the "Share via Microsoft Teams" button to page tools
chatbot-backend-slack-help-message: No handler is defined for your request. Check available slash commands for this application
chatbot-backend-auth-error-invalid: Cannot authenticate your user. Please check if you entered your chat username in your user profile on wiki correctly
chatbot-backend-message-ai-processing: ✨ Just a moment — I’m analyzing your question and finding the most relevant information…
